title: Hotkey Chat Messages
description: This mod allows you to hotkey up to 10 chat messages/commands!
body:
# Hotkey Chat
## Bind chat messages and commands to hotkeys with dynamic variable support!

### **Features**
- 10 Configurable Chat Presets - Bind frequently used messages or commands to Numpad keys (1-9 and 0)
- Dynamic Variables - Automatically insert real-time game data into your messages:
> - **{coords}** - Your current coordinates
> - **{health} / {food}** - Health and hunger levels
> - **{dimension} / {biome}** - Current dimension and biome
> - **{facing}** - Direction you're facing
> - **{player}** - Your username
> - **{target}** - Entity you're looking at
> - **{time} / {date}** - Real-world time
**And more!**
- **Command Support** - Messages starting with / are sent as commands
- **In-Game Config Screen** - Press H to configure presets (rebindable)
- **Mod Menu Integration** - Access settings from Mod Menu
## Use Cases
- Share your location with friends: "I'm at {coords} in the {dimension}!"
- Quick status updates: "Health: {health}/{max_health} | Food: {food}"
- Server commands: "/home", "/tpa {receiver}"
- Roleplay messages, callouts, and more!

## Made by: Redy
### If there are any bugs or you have any questions feel free to reach out! [Discord: vqke]
